prompt:
A travel poster themed after Tokyo in a watercolor and collage style. Vertical composition. Soft pastel colors and warm tones evocative of the twilight golden hour.
Scene:
The Tokyo waterfront at dusk. A futuristic Yurikamome train on the right, a person walking a bicycle on the left. People strolling on the promenade. The background features the Tokyo skyline, Tokyo Tower, Tokyo Skytree, and a cluster of skyscrapers. In the distance are the Rainbow Bridge and Tokyo Bay, with yakatabune boats and small ferries. Gulls fly in the sky, and trees line the promenade. The calm water reflects the setting sun.

Design Elements:
Large "TOKYO 2026" at the top left.
Below that, small text: "Neon Breeze Quiet Motion Eastern Metropolis."
Vertical Japanese text at the top right.
Below that, small English: "TOKYO JAPAN."
Coordinates at the bottom left: "35.6762° N 139.6503° E."
Below that: "TOKYO JAPAN" with a wave icon.
Handwritten-style script "Tokyo" at the bottom center.
Vertical text at the bottom right: "City Light Bay Train People Slow Life" and vertical Japanese text.
Overlaid with translucent geometric shapes, watercolor splashes, and teal and beige texture layers.
Style:
A fusion of modern travel posters and watercolor painting. Airy and open. A natural blend of illustration and photo collage. Warm and quiet atmosphere. Ultra-high definition, high detail.
